transcript: Uh... I was put on hold.
Okay, and what were you looking for?
Um... nothin'. Somebody called me at Chic-Fil-A in Park Meadows Mall. [to someone in background] Do you need sauce or anything with that? [to phone] Somebody called me and put me on hold.
Um... [to people in background] Did anyone call Chic-Fil-A...?
[to people in background] At the mall?
[to someone in background] Barbeque, honey mustard, sweet and sour.
Um... I'm sorry, uh... this is Wax Trax Records. I don't know why anyone would have called you.
